reasons: Round 010 improved artifact capture and drafted dry-run criteria
but the -NoRun validation created an unintended round_011 artifact and polluted latest-round detection

findings.issue: -NoRun creates a persistent next round directory, so validation polluted .ai/active_task/rounds with round_011.
findings.required_fix: Change validation/dry-run behavior so safe checks do not allocate a real round by default, or add a separate validation mode/path.

findings.issue: state.md Latest artifacts omits tests.txt despite new capture behavior.
findings.required_fix: Include tests.txt in Latest artifacts when it is captured.

findings.issue: Invoke-Expression is used for workflow test commands.
findings.required_fix: Clarify trusted-input assumption or constrain execution in a future hardening pass.

verification.tests: python -m unittest discover -s tests -v -> 89 tests OK

next_prompt: Narrow T2 fix for ai-kimi-run.ps1 artifact behavior; no installer implementation.
